name: Swedish Cardamom Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the evaporated milk. Stir in the sugar, salt, and butter until cooled to lukewarm.
2. Dissolve the yeast in warm water in a separate bowl.
3. Add the dissolved yeast mixture to the milk mixture.
4. Add the beaten eggs, 3 cups of sifted flour, and cardamom (and raisins if desired) to the yeast mixture.
5. Beat until smooth.
6. Stir in an additional 2 cups of sifted flour until a smooth and elastic dough forms.
7. Place the dough in a greased bowl, brush with butter, cover, and let rise until doubled in bulk (about 1 hour).
8. Punch down the dough, turn onto a floured surface, and divide into 6 parts.
9. Roll each part into 10-inch strands.
10. Braid 3 strands loosely. Make 2 braids from the remaining strands.
11. Place the braid on a greased baking sheet.
12. Let rise until doubled (about 1 hour).
13. Before baking, brush with egg white mixture (egg white, water, and sugar). Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
